title: Silver Candles, 10'' Silver Taper Candles, Set of 4 Spiral Twisted Dinner Candle, Non-Drip 7 Hour Burn Time Unscented Decorative Candle Sticks for Valentine's Day Christmas Birthday Party Home Decor
features: Sophisticated Elegance: Create a refined atmosphere with our 10-inch twisted candles, designed to complement any setting, from festive holiday tables to formal events. These dinner candles are 10 inches long with bottom diameters of 0.8 inches, designed to fit most standard candlesticks.

Set of 4: Included 4 pcs tapered candles, it's a great choice of Halloween candles, Christmas candles, dinner candles, home candles, table candles, chime candles, Shabbat candles, wedding decor, and prayer candles.

High Quality: A special formula process controls the melting point and burning speed precisely. The special metallized film matches the candle to make it burn more uniformly and stably. It can almost not drip when perpendicular to the centre of gravity and is windless, better than the other taper candles.
Dripless & Clean Burning: Enjoy your gatherings without worrying about the wax mess. Our dripless thin candles ensure a clean burn, keeping your tablecloths and surfaces spotless.
Extended Burn Time: Each taper candle burns for an impressive duration, adding charm to your celebrations. Light up your events with confidence, knowing these candles will last.
